creator: vas@sibptus.ru
text:
I'll show you something funny.

# service fcgiwrap restart
Stopping fcgiwrap.
Starting fcgiwrap.
/root/.acme.sh/acme.sh.csh: Permission denied.
#

This probably means that "service fcgiwrap restart" for some reason reads /root/.cshrc from where /root/.acme.sh/acme.sh.csh is sourced.

Why should this happen?
